description: Given a single raster image of a folded paper strip with labeled visible segments, infer the true order of the labels along the underlying strip from START to END.

answer_format.constraints: A permutation of the visible segment labels (e.g. ABCDE) with no separators; exact match required.

difficulty_rationale: The visually obvious shortcut (left-to-right or nearest-neighbor continuity in 2D) is intentionally unreliable due to folds, occlusions, and crossings.
The correct order is recoverable by tracing texture continuity at segment ends, which is human-auditable but brittle for LLM vision systems.
